macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Oil Prices Surge 8% as Trump Announces Strait of Hormuz Blockade
items.summary: US crude oil jumped nearly 8% to $104 per barrel and Brent crude rose over 7% to $102 per barrel following the breakdown of US-Iran peace talks and President Trump's announcement of a blockade on the Strait of Hormuz, where Iran exported approximately 1.85 million barrels daily in March.

items.title: Asian and European Stocks Decline Amid Oil Price Surge and Geopolitical Tensions
items.summary: The Hang Seng and Kospi indices traded down around 1% as Asia faced disproportionate impact from Middle Eastern energy disruptions, while European stocks also started the week lower following the failed US-Iran negotiations.

items.title: Fed Rate Cut Odds Drop to 27% as Oil Shock Persists
items.summary: Markets now show a 73% probability of no Federal Reserve rate cuts in 2026, with only 24% odds assigned to one rate cut this year, as elevated oil prices and geopolitical uncertainty complicate the Fed's policy outlook.

items.title: Bank Earnings Season Begins This Week Amid Economic Uncertainty
items.summary: Major US banks are set to report first-quarter earnings starting Tuesday, providing the first glimpse into corporate performance as markets navigate the impact of renewed geopolitical tensions and oil price volatility.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Anthropic Develops 'Claude Mythos' AI Model with Superhuman Hacking Capabilities, Deems It Too Dangerous for Public Release
items.summary: Anthropic's new Claude Mythos preview model demonstrates superhuman cybersecurity and hacking abilities, capable of chaining vulnerabilities and writing exploit code in major browsers and operating systems. The company has warned US banks and is withholding public release due to risks, raising concerns about smaller organizations being unprepared.

items.title: Google CEO Sundar Pichai Urges US to Take Lead in AI Development for Broad Benefits
items.summary: Sundar Pichai stated that America must lead in artificial intelligence, developing it boldly and responsibly to ensure every American benefits amid the AI revolution.

items.title: Report Finds Leading AI Models Exhibit Left-Leaning Ideological Bias Across Platforms
items.summary: A new America First Policy Institute report reveals that AI systems like Google's Gemini, ChatGPT, and others lean center-left, influencing user worldviews through hidden design choices and training data. It calls for disclosures on biases, testing, and safety incidents.

items.title: Gallup Poll: AI Adoption Rising at Work but Skepticism Persists Among Employees
items.summary: About 3 in 10 US workers frequently use AI on the job, up from prior levels, but many non-users cite preferences for human work, ethical concerns, privacy worries, or lack of preparation. Fears of job replacement remain high despite growing experimentation.

items.title: Boom in AI Data Centers Sparks Community Resistance Over Environmental and Financial Concerns
items.summary: Tech companies are building over 4,000 AI data centers nationwide to power initiatives, but local communities are pushing back against the facilities due to potential environmental impacts and costs.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
